name: Polish Cabbage Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef, rice, egg, onion, carrot, salt and pepper.
2. Mix together vinegar, brown sugar and tomato sauce.
3. Drop cabbage in boiling water for 5 to 10 minutes.
4. Remove 10 large leaves. Chop remaining cabbage.
5. Place chopped cabbage in the bottom of a crockpot.
6. Place 2 to 4 tablespoons of meat mixture in the center of each leaf.
7. Roll up and secure with toothpicks.
8. Place stem side down in the crockpot.
9. Pour on tomato mixture.
10. Cover and cook on LOW for 8 to 10 hours.
